# Schemas

The JSON Schemas that `ost` validates its documents against. Sourced from [`schemas/`](../../schemas/).

## `lock.schema.json`

OpenStrata Lockfile

The generated strata.lock pinning a reproducible runtime + session.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `lock_version` | integer | no |  |
| `python` | object | yes |  |
| `runtime` | object | yes |  |
| `validation` | string | yes |  |

## `platform.schema.json`

OpenStrata Platform Manifest

A machine-readable VFX Reference Platform calendar-year definition.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `core` | object | yes | Component -> version constraint map. |
| `id` | string | yes | Calendar-year id, e.g. cy2026. |
| `notes` | string | no |  |
| `source` | object | yes |  |

## `plugin-report.schema.json`

OpenStrata Plugin Verification Report

report.json written under .strata/reports/<plugin>/<UTC-timestamp>/ by `ost plugin doctor\|inspect\|test`. The `ost plugin doctor --json` stdout is a superset of the on-disk file: it additionally carries `report_dir` and `environment`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `ci` | object | no | CI evidence, present only when the run happened inside a generated CI job (the job exports OST_CI_* variables): which support cell this report proves, on which lane and runner, against which pinned artifacts. Fields other than `cell` are null when the job did not export them. |
| `diagnostics` | array | yes |  |
| `environment` | object | no | Only on `doctor --json` stdout: the session env preview (mirrors environment.json). Absent from the on-disk report.json. |
| `kind` | string | yes |  |
| `license` | ["string","null"] | no | SPDX license expression for the plugin's own code, from the bundle manifest. Null when the manifest declares none. |
| `passed` | boolean | yes |  |
| `plugin` | string | yes |  |
| `report_dir` | string | no | Only on `doctor`/`test` --json stdout: the report directory just written. Absent from the on-disk report.json. |
| `schema` | integer | yes |  |
| `summary` | object | yes |  |
| `version` | string | no |  |

## `project.schema.json`

OpenStrata Project Manifest

The openstrata.toml authored at a project root.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `project` | object | yes |  |
| `requires` | object | yes |  |
